title: the follow up question was what percent of VC investments will be automated and when i guessed 5-10% by dollars in 3-5 yrs… maybe?

content.summary: the follow up question was what percent of VC investments will be automated and when i guessed 5-10% by dollars in 3-5 yrs… maybe? Yohei (@yoheinakajima) i just mentioned in a talk that 1/3 of stock trades are automated, but that was widely outdated apparently it's now 70-80% of market transactions that are carried out through automated trading software — https://nitter.net/yoheinakajima/status/2036538780279300338#m
